display_name: Cloudflare Skills — Official Cloudflare Agent Skills
description: Official Cloudflare skills for teaching agents how to build on Cloudflare (640 stars, Apache-2.0). 9 skills: agents-sdk, building-ai-agent-on-cloudflare, building-mcp-server-on-cloudflare, cloudflare (general), durable-objects, sandbox-sdk, web-perf, workers-best-practices, wrangler. Includes Claude plugin config, Cursor plugin config, MCP config, commands and rules.
author: cloudflare
notes: Official Cloudflare skills. Each skill has SKILL.md + references/ subfolder with detailed docs. Claude Code compatible via .claude-plugin/ config. Cursor compatible via .cursor-plugin/. MCP server config in .mcp.json. Workers rules in rules/workers.mdc.
